nodes.label: Living Things
nodes.description: Characteristics of living things: plants, animals, and their habitats

nodes.label: Characteristics
nodes.description: Features that make something a living thing

nodes.label: Growth
nodes.description: Living things grow bigger in size over time

nodes.label: Breathing
nodes.description: Living things take in oxygen and give out carbon dioxide

nodes.label: Reproduction
nodes.description: Living things produce young ones of their own kind

nodes.label: Plants
nodes.description: Living things that make their own food using sunlight

nodes.label: Parts of a Plant
nodes.description: Roots, stem, leaves, flowers, and fruits

nodes.label: Photosynthesis
nodes.description: Plants use sunlight, water, and CO2 to make food

nodes.label: Animals
nodes.description: Living things that eat plants or other animals for food

nodes.label: Herbivores
nodes.description: Animals that eat only plants: cow, deer, rabbit

nodes.label: Carnivores
nodes.description: Animals that eat only other animals: tiger, eagle, shark

nodes.label: Omnivores
nodes.description: Animals that eat both plants and animals: bear, crow, human

nodes.label: Habitats
nodes.description: Natural homes where living things find food, water, and shelter

nodes.label: Forest
nodes.description: Tall trees, many animals: Sundarbans, Western Ghats

nodes.label: Desert
nodes.description: Hot, dry, sandy: Thar Desert in Rajasthan

nodes.label: Water Bodies
nodes.description: Ponds, rivers, oceans: home to fish, frogs, and water plants
